title: Market segment vocabulary entry
description: A controlled-vocabulary entry for a market segment, optionally hierarchical via 'parent'. Referenced by id from content 'classification.market_segments'.

parent.description: Id of the parent segment, for hierarchy (e.g. 'transport.road' -> parent 'transport'). Omit for top-level segments.

site.description: Website-presentation fields for this segment's landing page. Not part of the shared cross-content classification model - this vocabulary entry doubles as a CMS record for a themed segment overview/detail page (icon, colours, intro copy, narrative description of EO's role, and curated per-segment notes on which products matter and why). Keep optional; a segment with no 'site' block is still a valid, usable classification facet.

icon.description: Single glyph/emoji used as the segment's visual marker.

color.description: Primary accent colour (hex), used for borders/links/highlights.

color_bg.description: Light background tint paired with 'color', used for badges.

color_text.description: Text colour paired with 'color_bg' for accessible contrast on badges.

intro.description: Short editorial paragraph introducing the segment, shown on overview cards and the detail page header.

eo_role.description: Editorial paragraph on the general role Earth observation plays in this segment, shown in Section 01 of the detail page.

copernicus_role.description: Curated rows explaining which Copernicus products matter in this segment and why, shown in Section 03 of the detail page. This is editorial prose distinct from (and a curated subset of) the union of 'classification.products' tagged across the segment's use cases - it is not auto-derivable because the 'why' text doesn't exist anywhere else.

links.description: Curated external resource links shown on the segment detail page.
